title: lomatium humile
intro: Lomatium humile, also known as small desert parsley, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid compounds. The health benefits of Lomatium humile include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable herb in treating colds, flu, and other infections. Lomatium humile can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusions, and its roots can be dried and used in capsules or tablets for medicinal purposes.
